usage: Prepend set.continuity_lock + style.continuity_lock to every video_prompt. Append set.lighting_lock + set.color_guard + style.color_guard. Never swap set_id or style_id mid-scene.

global_hue_discipline.problem: Warm key lights drift magenta/purple across segments; cool fill contaminates amber pools.
rules: Declare Kelvin on every key — do not say warm without a number.
One dominant color temperature per scene; fill ≤15% intensity and ≤1 stop under key.
Forbidden globally unless style explicitly allows: magenta ambient, purple glass reflection, teal/cyan fill on tungsten sets, green skin shift, neon spill.
Re-ground lighting lock every REGROUND_EVERY_N=2 segments in long-form assembly.

@Set-Archive-001.name: The Archive
@Set-Archive-001.reference_anchor: environment plate @1 — deep scholarly library interior, wooden worktable, open codex, brass desk lamp, manuscript shelves
@Set-Archive-001.continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Archive-001: identical Archive interior — floor-to-ceiling manuscript shelves, long wooden worktable, open illuminated codex, cuneiform tablet, rolled papyrus, single brass desk lamp, same shelf blur depth, same eye-line to desk — seamless continuation, zero jump cut.
@Set-Archive-001.lighting_lock: Neutral balanced 5000K ambient key — even RGB, blue channel preserved in skin and shadow mids; brass desk lamp 3200K as motivated practical ONLY as localized warm pool on desk surface and lamp shade, NOT full-frame amber gel; no global yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows.
@Set-Archive-001.color_guard: GENERATION LOCK Archive-neutral (#194): balanced white balance 4800–5200K base, natural skin midtones with intact blue channel (B≥40 in mids), wood burnt umber #3D2B1F to #5C4033, parchment cream #F5F0E6, shadow warm-neutral grey #3A3530 — forbid dominant amber 3200K full-frame, forbid yellow-green global cast, forbid blue-starved generation (collapsed B channel), forbid magenta cast.
@Set-Archive-001.generation_color_lock: GENERATION LOCK Archive-neutral (#194): neutral balanced 5000K ambient key — even RGB, blue channel preserved in skin and shadow mids (B≥40); brass desk lamp 3200K as motivated practical ONLY as localized warm pool on desk surface and lamp shade, NOT full-frame amber gel; no global yellow-green cast; no blue-starved shadows; natural skin tone at source.

@Set-Studio-Interior-001.reference_anchor: environment plate @1 — white-to-pale-grey seamless cyclorama, polished concrete or white resin floor, minimal props, grip rig visible optional
@Set-Studio-Interior-001.continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Studio-Interior-001: identical editorial studio — seamless white cyclorama curve, same floor tone, same wall-to-floor sweep, same camera height, same negative space geometry — seamless continuation, zero jump cut.
@Set-Studio-Interior-001.lighting_lock: High-key studio 5600K key locked — even wrap, soft shadow under chin only, no color gel spill, no warm/cool mix, no hue drift between segments.
@Set-Studio-Interior-001.color_guard: COLOR LOCK Studio-Interior: backdrop pure neutral white #F7F7F5 to #EFEFED, skin accurate natural, shadow cool-neutral #D8D8D8 only — no yellow green cast, no magenta edge, no orange skin shift.
@Set-Studio-Interior-001.reference_prompt: Editorial fashion studio interior — seamless white-to-pale-grey cyclorama curve, polished white resin floor, minimal props, optional grip stand at frame edge. 16:9 cinematic wide shot, no people, empty set. High-key 5600K even wrap lighting, pure neutral white backdrop, soft floor-to-wall sweep, fashion editorial prestige aesthetic, photoreal cinematic lighting, SFW.
